questions.sentence: In any high performing engineering team differences in opinion are inevitable and can actually be healthy for innovation
However if not managed correctly these differences can escalate into destructive Conflict
A leader must approach conflict by focusing on interests rather than positions
Instead of arguing over which technology is better focus on the projects requirements and which tool provides the best balance of speed and maintainability
High quality leadership is about transforming conflict into a constructive dialogue that strengthens the team and leads to better decision making
